item.title: STEAK SANDWICH🥩 Ingredients For the caramelized onions: -Yell...
item.description:
STEAK SANDWICH🥩 Ingredients For the caramelized onions: -Yellow onions -Butter -Extra virgin olive oil -Salt -Pinch of sugar -Dry white wine or vermouth -Thyme -Beef stock For the spread: -Garlic -Extra virgin olive oil (to confit garlic) -Crème fraîche -Chives -Fresh lemon juice -Sherry vinegar -Dash of horseradish (optional) -Salt -Black pepper For the steak -Ribeye or NY strip -Salt -Pepper -High smoke-point oil (Ie: beef tallow, avocado oil) -Butter -Rosemary -Thyme -Garlic clove To serve: -Baguette or ciabatta -arugula -Gruyère or Comté cheese
#steaksandwich
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED
